data.body:
Brainstorm: ticket audit-trail UI — design + decomposition.

GOAL: a read-only web UI to review a ticket's audit trail — latest plan review, completion
verification, latest associated code review, plus ticket show info; navigate plan/code review
history; each review shows the full four-pass record (pass1 findings, pass2 verification, pass3
determination + thresholds, pass4 coaching). Optional, disabled by default.

RESEARCH (3 parallel subagents):
- Prior art: dominant pattern = subcommand starting a localhost-only, no-auth server behind an
  optional dependency extra with lazy imports (datasette, sqlite-web, mlflow, git instaweb);
  static-HTML export (coverage.py) is the archival alternative. rebar's reviewbot FastAPI extra is
  the in-repo precedent. Flask/FastAPI both viable; reuse FastAPI to avoid a 2nd framework.
- UX: master-detail; Gerrit-style newest-first round selector for history; PatternFly read-only
  vertical stepper for the four passes; SonarQube-style verdict + bullet-gauge for thresholds;
  collapse-by-default findings with norm_id traceability; honest 'not yet run' states.
- Codebase feasibility findings that reshaped the spec:
  * Pass1-4 intermediate data IS persisted in reducer-ignored REVIEW_RESULT sidecars, but pruned
    to last 10/ticket and NOT in show_ticket; plan-review sidecar drops pass-1 evidence/scenarios;
    code-review sidecar persists only surfaced (blocking/advisory/coaching) buckets. Neither
    persists the numeric block_threshold (resolved from criteria registry at decide time).
  * Code reviews ARE linked to the work ticket: voter.emit_code_review_artifact links the
    code_review artifact relates_to each rebar-ticket trailer ref (story
    limestone-unethical-zebrafinch). UI resolves ticket->code reviews via inbound relates_to.
  * Completion verifier is single-pass; findings are FAILURES-ONLY by contract (reconcile_verdict
    flips PASS-with-findings to FAIL); on PASS only signed counts persist. Rich PASS capture needs
    an agent output-contract change (new optional criteria[] array).

DECISIONS (user):
- Delivery: live localhost server (rebar audit serve).
- Code-review source: existing relates_to links (no new mechanism).
- Threshold: persist block_threshold/blocking_enabled into the sidecar at review time.
- Retention: raise cap (10 -> 50) AND increase BOTH sidecars' scope to fully capture the audit.
- Completion: expand capture too (agent contract + PASS-path sidecar).
- Split into TWO epics: (1) data enrichment, (2) UI (depends_on 1).

TICKETS CREATED:
- Epic 1 ENRICHMENT ba33-2310-f6c6-4bd6 (courtly-linear-iguana). Children:
  A 4e19-5846-0e3f-4882 halfbare-tsaristic-barnacle  plan-review sidecar -> v2 (evidence/scenarios/thresholds)
  B 7c84-40dc-c112-410c immoveable-tanned-snail        code-review sidecar -> v2 (all buckets + thresholds)
  C e7e0-49af-7200-4340 crumply-denim-pitbull          completion PASS lossless capture (criteria[] + PASS sidecar)
  D fde0-5020-5923-490f complex-laminate-fanworms      raise retention cap 10->50 (shared constant)
  E 46f0-4e09-b8ed-4a4e carefree-gushy-argusfish       audit read layer (all_review_results + audit_trail + CLI/MCP)
  E depends_on A,B,C.
- Epic 2 UI 2141-0ba0-5313-48d4 (horoscopic-jaded-zebradove), depends_on Epic 1. Children:
  F a3d7-fadb-e7e9-4e2c cultivated-aquatic-crow        web server scaffolding ([ui] extra, config flag, loopback)
  G ff6f-b655-4058-4308 depressant-amethyst-wasp       per-ticket page (master-detail, 4-pass stepper, thresholds, history)
  G depends_on F.
- file_impact set on all stories + both epics.

STATUS / NEXT:
- Plan-review gate NOT yet run (review-plan ~5min/ticket; deferred until Epic 2 UX settled to avoid
  signing attestations we'd invalidate by editing). Epic 1 is stable and gateable independently.
- Epic 2 UX under active redesign: primary user = BOTH spot-checking auditor AND gate-debugger
  (summary-first default, full pass1-4 depth one click away). An HCD designer subagent is critiquing
  the proposed master-detail + gate-tabs + four-pass-stepper design (cognitive overload, nesting
  depth, cross-pass traceability, threshold display). Stories F/G descriptions likely to be revised
  from that critique before gating.
